label: plain_text
text:
In this chapter, we will
study
some ratios of the sides of a right triangle
ewith
respect to its acute angles, called trigonometric ratios of the angle. We will restrict
discussion to acute angles only. However,
ourc
these ratios can be extended to other
angles also. We will also define the trigonometric ratios for angles of measure
e 0° and
90°. We will c
calculate trigonometric ratios for some specific angles and establish
some identities involving
these ratios, called trigonometric identities.
